metadata.name: Contrast Intensity #14
metadata.description:
A contrast between the two sides animation shows different color and texture intensity.

Press ’s’ on the live mode to save the screen capture.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Power Source #11
metadata.description:
Interpreting the idea of power sources within the artificial and natural existence in the world. Visualizing it as an imaginary outer space processor chip that keeps absorbing its surrounding energy.
______________________________________________________________

///INTERACTIVITY///
Read the instructions below and do it after opening the live mode.

1. Press the "c" button on your computer keyboard to save a frame from your minted iteration.

2. To save a 3-second .GIF file, press the "s" button on your computer keyboard. Please be patient while waiting for the piece to save and render its frames.

3. The animated visual will always behave following the screen's resolution (e.g. the visual on 1:1 view and the live mode will show differently, but still give the same impression of the minted iteration). To adjust the piece resolution, you need to set your browser first and then reload the browser every time you want to capture the screen or save the rendered .GIFs file.
______________________________________________________________

Created using Hydra and p5.js

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2023
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Can't Hold To Agitates #3
metadata.description:
A short moment triggers an agitation, creating almost unstoppable existential chaos.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022

metadata.name: Unstoppable Saturation #5
metadata.description:
Loads of rectangles are sorted and create what seems to be an unstoppable saturation of its quantity, textures, and colors. Forming new appearances from its accumulation.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Two Sides Of A Story #6
metadata.description:
I live inside a house
The house has a side that I love
On that side, there's a door that feels exciting to pass by
There's also a window that makes me always enthusiastic to take a peek outside
All of these make me happy

I live inside a house
The house has a side that I hate
On that side, there's a door that feels boring to pass by
There's also a window that makes me always apathetic to take a peek outside
But it's all fine for me

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Ball of Forecast #5
metadata.description:
This feeling arises when you are in a calm situation but your heart feels like something bad will happen.

Press ’s’ on the live mode after 'zoom-out' the live mode tab to save the high-quality screen capture. 

n.b. The smaller the zoom percentage, the higher the image quality you will get.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

linxirwengi - 2022

metadata.name: A Strange Loop #221
metadata.description:
[ TAP/CLICK TO ACTIVATE SOUND ]

A whiff of pattern begins to emerge. Out of disarray comes the familiar pulsation of an ordered signal. The sense of regularity strengthens and we feel it swelling towards a singularity. Heeere weeee goooo… BAM! Then off again marching back into chaos to repeat the cycle.

Proposed by cognitive scientist Douglas Hofstadter in his 1979 book “Gödel, Escher, Bach”, and further developed in his 2007 book “I Am a Strange Loop”, “Strange Loops” are Hofstadter’s attempt at explaining the mechanisms that give rise to the sensation of “I” - through hierarchical, self-referential, and at times seemingly paradoxical feedback-loops of abstraction and causality. 

—

“Who shoves whom around in the tangled megaganglion that is your brain, and who shoves whom around in ‘this teetering bulb of dread and dream’ that is mine?”

“Do dreads and dreams, hopes and griefs, ideas and beliefs, interests and doubts, infatuations and envies, memories and ambitions, bouts of nostalgia and floods of empathy, flashes of guilt and sparks of genius, play any role in the world of physical objects? Do such pure abstractions have causal powers? Can they shove massive things around, or are they just impotent fictions?” 

"In the end, we are self-perceiving, self-inventing, locked-in mirages that are little miracles of self-reference. [...] Poised midway between the unvisualizable cosmic vastness of curved spacetime and the dubious, shadowy flickerings of charged quanta, we human beings, more like rainbows and mirages than like raindrops or boulders, are unpredictable self-writing poems — vague, metaphorical, ambiguous, and sometimes exceedingly beautiful.”

- Douglas Hofstadter, “I Am a Strange Loop”, 2007

–-

Memo Akten 
ƈօʍքʊtǟtɨօռǟʟ Aʀȶɨֆȶ; AI wrangler; curious philomath; PhD in Creative Artificial Intelligence with Meaningful Human Control; works with code to create images, sounds, films, large-scale responsive installations and performances; fascinated by trying to understand the nature of nature and the human condition.

James Paterson 
Synthesizing drawing, animation, sculpture and code under the moniker Presstube since 1999. Inspired by meditation, molecular biology, music, parenting, psychedelics, the seen, the heard, the felt, the cognized.

–-

Controls:
- CLICK/TAP ONCE ON THE SCREEN TO ACTIVATE SOUND
- ‘S’: to toggle Sound on/off (only works when opened fullscreen)

metadata.name: fxBLOCK #161
metadata.description:
fxBLOCK is a collection of speculative architectures. 
Each minted BLOCK is constructed using a set of polyvalent parts in various deterministic tectonic configurations, lights, and moods. 

fx(hash) genesis Generative Token by @grasser_alex 2021

metadata.name: LIQUID #24
metadata.description:
Painting on canvas using feedback, modulations and noises to recreate the idea of an interactive 'liquid show'. Open livemode, activate your webcam and click on the canvas to start the interaction.
The artwork will adjust to your monitor's resolution but still maintain its aspect ratio.

In commemoration of FXHASH's 1 year anniversary.
You can control some parameters of the video input to adjust the effect with:
1 -> Inverts the brightness values
7/8 -> Increases or decreases the limit on the first parameter
+/- -> Increases or decreases the threshold on the second parameter
P' -> Saves a png from canvas

Designed for desktop computers on Google Chrome
Developed with Hydra.js

metadata.name: Stamp of Puffy #1
metadata.description:
repetition of moving shapes that seem to collide with each other with subtle reactions like spilled ink.

made using Hydra.js Library

Linxirwengi (Alieneta Firdausi), 2025

different vibe and realm, switch it by moving your mouse horizontally.

made using Hydra.js Library

Linxirwengi (Alieneta Firdausi), 2025

metadata.name: Ancient Murked Heritage #7
metadata.description:
“It is a heritage, left by the ancestor far before the realm became murked. Until today, many went to the portal and never came back.”

This artwork was the continuation of the piece titled “Murked Being”. It also stands as another attempt to develop the aesthetic style for “Murked Being” universe lore creation.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Spectre Eyes #4
metadata.description:
In the unknown realm, two dominant eyes show their existence along with the others, roaming around without exact purpose.

Use your mouse to move the glowing eyes.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

metadata.name: Unstable Space #99
metadata.description:
The piece interprets the imaginary senses of an unstable space, where various disruptions might happen within its existence.

Inspired by the human tendency to need a private safe space but instead always faces a contradiction with reality. All are accumulated and abstracted into moving visual representations.
______________________________________________________________

///INTERACTIVITY///
Read the instructions below and do it after opening the live mode.

1. Press the "c" button on your computer keyboard to save a frame from your minted iteration.

2. To save a 3-second & 30 fps .GIF file, press the "s" button on your computer keyboard. Please be patient while waiting for the piece to save and render its frames.

3. The animated visual will always behave following the screen's resolution (e.g. the visual on 1:1 view and the live mode will show differently, but still give the same impression of the minted iteration). To adjust the piece resolution, you need to set your browser first and then reload the browser every time you want to capture the screen or save the rendered .GIFs file.

Created using Hydra and p5.js

metadata.name: Fracture #10
metadata.description:
Interpreting the idea of a fracture that might be taken as a term for something that breaks. Thinking about how once a thing got fractured, it is never the same after it got "fixed" or "healed".

This piece was part of my contemplation about how important it is to have wisdom in life to avoid things getting fractured. Conceptually and physically.
______________________________________________________________

///INTERACTIVITY///
Read the instructions below and do it after opening the live mode.

1. Press the "c" button on your computer keyboard to save a frame from your minted iteration.

2. To save a 2-second & 60 fps .GIF file, press the "s" button on your computer keyboard. Please be patient while waiting for the piece to save and render its frames.

3. To adjust the piece resolution, you need to set your browser first and then reload the browser every time you want to capture the screen or save the rendered .GIF file.
______________________________________________________________

Created using Hydra and p5.js

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2023
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji
